title: Create note-to-file
description: Append a structured note (author, timestamp, type, content) to memory/inbox/YYYY-MM-DD.md and memory/notes.jsonl. Use for any text/voice/idea that must persist.
goal: Provide a reusable, append-only procedure for persisting any text/voice/idea to the workspace inbox, with consistent timestamp + author + kind metadata.
evidence: The Telegram notes bot (scripts/telegram_notes_bot.py) already implements this pattern in append_note(); the skill formalises the same contract so the agent (or any other channel) can reuse it without re-deriving the format.
